description: Calibration factors for Texas TRS pension model
source: Computed to match TRS valuation report (from R model TxTRS_model_inputs.R)
notes: cal_factor = 12.1 / 12.189475 adjusts DB benefits to match plan's PVFB. nc_cal = 12.1 / 12.1117 fine-tunes normal cost. pvfb_term_current = val's AAL - model's AAL. Full-precision values match R model (TxTRS_model_inputs.R lines 104-105).
